info.title: OSK.UML.CommandLine
info.description: Command-line tool to generate UML diagrams for a projects.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generates a UML diagram based on the provided options and target.

options.name: --path
options.description: Specifies the path to a file or directory to be parsed.

options.name: --directoryDepth
options.description: How deep should the generator look for files, within a directory, when creating the UML.

options.name: --fileTypes
options.description: Filter for the types of files that will be included in the uml diagram.

options.name: --name
options.description: The name of the output file that will be generated for the UML diagram.

options.name: --outputDirectory
options.description: Sets the output path to use for the exported uml diagram.

options.name: --plantUmlPath
options.description: Override the path location for the plant uml jar file that will be used to create UML diagrams.

options.name: --path
options.description:
Required. Specifies the path to a file or directory
to be parsed.

options.name: --fileTypes
options.description:
(Default: .cs) Filter for the types of files that
will be included in the uml diagram.

options.name: --directoryDepth
options.description:
(Default: 1) How deep should the generator look for
files, within a directory, when creating the UML.

options.name: --name
options.description:
(Default: domainModel) The name of the output file
that will be generated for the UML diagram.

options.name: --outputDirectory
options.description:
(Default: .) Sets the output path to use for the
exported uml diagram.

options.name: --plantUmlPath
options.description:
Override the path location for the plant uml jar file
that will be used to create UML diagrams.
